items.summary:
좋은점
슬더스/림버스 좋아하면 할만한 게임
캐릭터랑 세계관도 매력적
숙제는 금방 끝낼 수 있음

나쁜점
멘퀘 후반으로 갈수록 난이도 급상승
번역때문에 분위기 깸
합성 편의성 약간 모자람
가챠 가격이 싸진않음(초반에 멘퀘에서 많이 퍼주긴함)

한국 정출해서 번역이랑 폰트 개선좀 ㅠ

items.title: [负面] Now listen, don't get me wrong, this game is proba...
items.summary:
Now listen, don't get me wrong, this game is probably one of the most free to play friendly gachas ever. The slay the spire style gameplay with the gacha system is pretty cool actually. The story is interesting. And the game doesn't really skill check you too bad until you get to the end of chapter 3. Generally the events are very generous, there's a lot of easy ways to get summons and resources without spending any money at all!

So why am I giving it a negative review: You cannot ♥♥♥♥ Thais. Thais is best girl and I can't have wet, sloppy sex with her. Also ngl the bosses in the finale are pretty damn annoying.

items.title: [正面] Gioco meraviglioso sotto ogni aspetto
